mapper.select: SELECT mem_idx, mem_id, mem_name, mem_email FROM member WHERE mem_idx = #{memIdx}
SELECT a.*, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM bid b WHERE b.auction_idx = a.auction_idx) as bidCount FROM auction a WHERE a.mem_idx = #{memIdx} ORDER BY a.reg_date DESC
SELECT * FROM bid WHERE mem_idx = #{memIdx} ORDER BY bid_date DESC
SELECT board_idx, title, reg_date, read_count FROM board WHERE mem_idx = #{memIdx} ORDER BY reg_date DESC
SELECT b.*, a.title as auctionTitle FROM bid b JOIN auction a ON b.auction_idx = a.auction_idx WHERE b.mem_idx = #{memIdx} ORDER BY b.bid_date DESC
